questions.question: If your property Insurance has Actual Cash Valuation (ACV) clause, your damaged property

options.A: Rep|acement with a new item for the old one regardless ofcondition of lost
options.B: Value of item on the date of loss plus 10 percent
options.C: Value of item one month before the
options.D: Value of item on the date of

questions.explanation: The correct answer is D: Value of item on the date of. The other options are incorrect: A (Rep|acement with a new item for the old one regardless ofcondition of lost); B (Value of item on the date of loss plus 10 percent); C (Value of item one month before the).

questions.question: If your property Insurance has Replacement Cost Valuation (RCV) clause your damaged property

options.A: Based on new, comparable, or identical item for old regardless of condition of
options.B: Based on the value listed on the Ebay auction web site
options.C: Based on value of item one month before the
options.D: Based on the value of item on the date of

questions.explanation: The correct answer is A: Based on new, comparable, or identical item for old regardless of condition of. The other options are incorrect: B (Based on the value listed on the Ebay auction web site); C (Based on value of item one month before the); D (Based on the value of item on the date of).

questions.question: What is the Maximum Tolerable Downtime (MTD)?

options.A: Maximum elapsed time required to complete recovery of application data
options.B: Maximum elapsed time required to move back to primary site after a major
options.C: It is maximum delay businesses can tolerate and
options.D: Minimum elapsed time required to complete recovery of application data

questions.explanation: The correct answer is C: It is maximum delay businesses can tolerate and. The other options are incorrect: A (Maximum elapsed time required to complete recovery of application data); B (Maximum elapsed time required to move back to primary site after a major); D (Minimum elapsed time required to complete recovery of application data).

questions.question: Which is not one of the primary goals of BIA?

options.A: Deciding on various test to be performed to validate Business Contuity Plan
options.B: Critica|ity Prioritization
options.D: Down time estimation

questions.explanation: The correct answer is A: Deciding on various test to be performed to validate Business Contuity Plan. The other options are incorrect: B (Critica|ity Prioritization); C (Determining requirements for critical business); D (Down time estimation).

questions.question: Which primary element of BCP includes carrying out vulnerability analysis?

options.B: Business Continuity Plan Development
options.D: Scope and Plan

questions.explanation: The correct answer is C: Business Impact Assessment. The other options are incorrect: A (Plan Approval and); B (Business Continuity Plan Development); D (Scope and Plan).

questions.question: Which one of the following is NOT one of the outcomes of a vulnerability

options.B: Formal approval of BCP scope and initiation document
options.D: Qualitative loss assessment

questions.explanation: The correct answer is B: Formal approval of BCP scope and initiation document. The other options are incorrect: A (Quantative loss assessment); C (Defining critical support areas); D (Qualitative loss assessment).

questions.question: The term critical support areas is defined as

options.A: Business units or functions that must be present to sustain continuity of business, maintain
options.B: Business units or functions that require support against man made disasters
options.D: Business units or functions that may be replaced by others in disaster situation

questions.explanation: The correct answer is A: Business units or functions that must be present to sustain continuity of business, maintain. The other options are incorrect: B (Business units or functions that require support against man made disasters); C (Human Resource and Information technologies); D (Business units or functions that may be replaced by others in disaster situation).

questions.question: The scope and focus of the Business continuity plan development depends most

options.B: Scope and Plan
options.D: Business Impact Analysis (BIA)

questions.explanation: The correct answer is D: Business Impact Analysis (BIA). The other options are incorrect: A (Directives ofSenior Management); B (Scope and Plan); C (Skills of BCP committee BCP).

questions.question: Which of the following items is NOT a benefit ofcold sites?

options.B: Quick Recovery
options.C: A secondary location is available to reconstruct the environment
options.D: No resource contention with other organisation

questions.explanation: The correct answer is B: Quick Recovery. The other options are incorrect: A (Low Cost); C (A secondary location is available to reconstruct the environment); D (No resource contention with other organisation).

questions.question: Qualitative loss resulting from the business interruption does NOT usually

options.B: Loss ofcompetitive advantage or market share
options.C: Loss of public confidence and credibility
options.D: Loss of market

questions.explanation: The correct answer is A: Loss of revenue. The other options are incorrect: B (Loss ofcompetitive advantage or market share); C (Loss of public confidence and credibility); D (Loss of market).

questions.question: Similarity between ALL recovery plans is

options.B: They need to be developed only by business continuity experts
options.D: They need to be fullytested at least everytwo years

questions.explanation: The correct answer is A: They become obsolete quickly. The other options are incorrect: B (They need to be developed only by business continuity experts); C (They create employment opportunities); D (They need to be fullytested at least everytwo years).

questions.question: What is NOT one of the drawbacks of hot sites?

options.A: Need Security controls, as it usually contain mirrored copies of
options.B: Full redundancy in hardware, software, communication lines and applications
options.C: The hot sites are available immediately or within maximum tolerable downtime
options.D: They are administratively resource intensive, as transaction redundacy controls need to be implemented to keep data up-to-date

questions.explanation: The correct answer is C: The hot sites are available immediately or within maximum tolerable downtime. The other options are incorrect: A (Need Security controls, as it usually contain mirrored copies of); B (Full redundancy in hardware, software, communication lines and applications); D (They are administratively resource intensive, as transaction redundacy controls need to be implemented to keep data up-to-date).

questions.question: What is the most correct choice below when talking about the steps to resume normal operation at the primary site after the green light has been given by the salvage team?

options.A: You moves items back in the same order as the categories document in your plan or exactly in the same order as you did on your wayto the alternate site
options.B: The most critical operations are moved from alternate site to primary site before
options.C: Operation may be carried by a completely different team than disaster recovery
options.D: The least critical functions should be moved back

questions.explanation: The correct answer is D: The least critical functions should be moved back. The other options are incorrect: A (You moves items back in the same order as the categories document in your plan or exactly in the same order as you did on your wayto the alternate site); B (The most critical operations are moved from alternate site to primary site before); C (Operation may be carried by a completely different team than disaster recovery).

options.B: Availability, Confidentiality and Integrity of the CIAtriad

options.B: a mirroring code
options.D: a hamming code

questions.explanation: The correct answer is D: a hamming code. The other options are incorrect: A (a striping code); B (a mirroring code); C (a clustering code).

options.B: Stafftraining
options.D: Availability of backup information processing

questions.question: What is the LEAST expensive alternative providing processing facilities in case a disaster should strike?

options.B: Reciprocal agreement
options.D: Warm site

questions.explanation: The correct answer is B: Reciprocal agreement. The other options are incorrect: A (Cold site); C (Hot site); D (Warm site).

options.B: The soundness of the business impact analysis.
options.D: Differences in IS policies and procedures.

questions.explanation: The correct answer is A: Hardware and software compatibility.. The other options are incorrect: B (The soundness of the business impact analysis.); C (Frequency of system testing.); D (Differences in IS policies and procedures.).

options.C: The use of a warm site is
options.D: The business units were not sufficiently involved or consulted in plan development.

questions.question: The MAIN advantage of using hot sites is

options.A: Hot sites can be made ready for operation within a short period oftime.
options.B: Hot sites do not require that equipment and systems software be compatible with the primary installation being backed up.
options.C: Hot sites can be used for an extended amount oftime.

questions.explanation: The correct answer is A: Hot sites can be made ready for operation within a short period oftime.. questions.question: What is the MAIN purpose for periodically testing off-site hardware backup facilities?

options.B: To ensure the integrity of the data in the
options.C: To ensure that program and system documentation remains current.

options.B: Cold site
options.D: Duplicate processing

questions.explanation: The correct answer is B: Cold site. The other options are incorrect: A (Warm site); C (Hot site); D (Duplicate processing).

questions.question: During the testing of the business continuity plan (BCP), which of the following methods of results analysis provides the BEST assurance that the plan is workable?

options.B: Elapsed time for completion ofcritical tasks
options.C: Quantitatively measuring the results of the test
options.D: Evaluation of the observed test results

questions.explanation: The correct answer is C: Quantitatively measuring the results of the test. The other options are incorrect: A (Measurement of accuracy); B (Elapsed time for completion ofcritical tasks); D (Evaluation of the observed test results).

options.B: Ensure that critical applications have been identified and that the alternate site could process all such applications.
options.C: |dentify applications that could be processed at the alternate site and develop manual procedures to back up other processing.
options.D: Do nothing, because generally, less than twenty

The other options are incorrect: A (Recommend that the information processing facility arrange for an alternate processing site with the capacity to handle at least seventy); C (|dentify applications that could be processed at the alternate site and develop manual procedures to back up other processing.); D (Do nothing, because generally, less than twenty).

options.A: Need not have the same level of environmental monitoring as the originating site since this would be cost prohibitive.

options.D: It should be easily identified from the outside so in the event of an emergency
